scripts.dev: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/server"
scripts.preview:live: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/server" "npm run dev:full -w @nexusforge/desktop"
scripts.beta:start: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently "npm run beta:web" "npm run beta:api"
scripts.desktop:full: npm run dev:cleanup && npx concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/server" "npm run dev -w @nexusforge/desktop"
scripts.desktop:open:installed: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$exe = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\NexusForge Desktop\NexusForge Desktop.exe'; if (Test-Path $exe) { Start-Process $exe } else { Write-Error 'Installed NexusForge Desktop executable not found. Run desktop:installer first.' }"
scripts.desktop:open:unpacked: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$exe = Resolve-Path 'apps\desktop\release\win-unpacked\NexusForge Desktop.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($exe) { Start-Process $exe.Path } else { Write-Error 'Unpacked executable not found. Run desktop:installer first.' }"
scripts.build: npm run build -w web && npm run build -w @nexusforge/server
